case_title: LI, JIE RU et al VS KUKUSHKIN, STANISLAV FELIKOVICH et al

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT STANISLAV FELICOVICH FILED FOR A CHANGE OF ADDRESS.
DEFT'S LETTER TO THE COMMISSIONER FILED,RE:CURRENT HEAR.DATE(12/15)RETENTION;FOLDER @506,TO TRAY.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-27-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-15-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT'S A CONDITION OF ADVANCING THE MATTER FOR TRIAL, DEFENDANT SHALL ACKNOWLEDGE SERVICE OF PROCESS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KUKUSHKIN, STANISLAV FELIKOVICH KUKUSHKIN, FELIX (OWNER)
DEFENDANT REQUEST TO ADVANCE THE DATE SENT TO JUDGE FOR APPROVAL. $10 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, JIE RU JIA, XU SHENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUKUSHKIN, STANISLAV FELIKOVICH KUKUSHKIN, FELIX (OWNER) $2,144.45 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,289.45, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1,144.45 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOSS OF USE; AND $500 TO EACH OF PLAINTIFF'S JIE RU LI AND XU SHENG JIA FOR PERSONAL INJURIES. THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND JUDGMENT ARE AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME TO STANISLAV FELIKOVICH KUKUSHKIN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-27-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-08-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLAINTIFF FILED CONTINUANCE REQUEST. ($10.00 FEE PAID CASH) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
